name: insights-share
description: Team-wide insight sharing for Claude Code instances. v0.2 adds the full Approach-B architecture: silent Stop-hook capture into per-session buffers, two-layer PII filter (regex + haiku) with Gate-0 corpus benchmark, GitHub mirror repo storage with per-repo PAT auth, sub-500ms hot-path retrieval with embedding fallback, and /insight-rate + /insight-flush skills.
